name: GPA Sataban Pan Saeb
original_name: GPA สถาบันพันธุ์แสบ
overview: Gentlemen's Pride Academy is known for its strict rules and regulations. New student Toy (Pathompong Reonchaidee) has a challenging time adjusting and meets his old rival, Foei (Patara Eksangkul). The two want to change the school by running for student council president and forming a new club to defeat the Four Heavenly Kings.

trailers.title: [Trailer] GPA สถาบันพันธุ์แสบ
